chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1477 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5785/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5786/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 15-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner being a civil servant is seeking his promotion, whereas, the jurisdiction of this Court is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, hence the instant Petition cannot be entertained under writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the Petition fails and it is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
